name: io.github.xiaolai/claude-octopus
description: Spawn multiple specialized Claude Code agents as MCP servers, each independently configured.

environmentVariables.name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Anthropic API key (leave unset to inherit from parent process)

environmentVariables.name: CLAUDE_MODEL
environmentVariables.description: Model: sonnet, opus, haiku, or full ID

environmentVariables.name: CLAUDE_PERMISSION_MODE
environmentVariables.description: Permission mode: default, acceptEdits, bypassPermissions, plan

environmentVariables.name: CLAUDE_ALLOWED_TOOLS
environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated list of available tools (e.g. Read,Grep,Glob for read-only)

environmentVariables.name: CLAUDE_APPEND_PROMPT
environmentVariables.description: Additional system prompt appended to the default

environmentVariables.name: CLAUDE_FACTORY_ONLY
environmentVariables.description: Set to true to expose only the factory wizard tool
